calls.notes: Programmatically opens the native OS file-picker dialog by forwarding the click to the hidden <input type='file'>. No network calls.
Sets uploading=true to disable the button; sets status text to 'Uploading...'.
Request interceptor attaches Authorization: Bearer {token} header if token is present. POST /api/upload is authenticated — a missing token yields 401.
Validates MIME type (application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png). Saves file to disk as {uuid}{ext} in config.uploadDir. Rejects non-matching MIME with Error('Invalid file type...').

Inserts name (from req.body.name or originalname), file_type (MIME), file_path (/uploads/{filename}), tags (null — UploadButton does not submit tags), uploaded_by (req.user?.email or null). Returns the inserted row via RETURNING *.
Calls the optional prop callback with the newly created document record. Only invoked when upload succeeds and the prop is provided.
Always runs in the finally block. Resets the file input value so the same file can be re-uploaded.
